title: Berm Tarturi
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Republic |image= |name=Berm Tarturi |homeworld=[[Andara/Legends|Andara]] |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] **[[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|It's just that I fear for Gillam. He thinks he is an adult. He is only sixteen.''"
"''I know what that is like.|Senator Berm Tarturi of Andara and Jedi Master Obi-Wan Kenobi, the latter thinking of Anakin|''[[Jedi Quest: The School of Fear]]''}} '''Berm Tarturi''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who [[Senator/Legends|represented]] [[Andara/Legends|Andara]] in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Tarturi's political enemy in the Senate was Senator [[Sano Sauro]]. In [[25 BBY/Legends|25 BBY]], the two politicians locked themselves in a vicious battle over the redistribution of trade routes in the [[Andaran system]]. Tarturi had a son named [[Gillam Tarturi|Gillam]], whose disappearance prompted the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] assignment of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Ferus Olin]], with the help of their [[Jedi Master/Legends|Masters]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Siri Tachi/Legends|Siri Tachi]], to investigate the campus and student body of Andara's elite [[Leadership School]]. But in truth, it was the politician's own son, Gillam himself—as the leader of a student mercenary squad at the school—who not only staged his own alleged kidnapping, but also sought to stage his own murder, to avenge himself of his lackluster father. For while Berm was one of the galaxy's typically competent enough albeit self-interested, power-retaining politicians, the quality of his parenting skills was clearly not lost on his son, and, as Kenobi observed, left much to be desired. {{Char-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[Jedi Quest: The School of Fear]]'' {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Berm Tarturi }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Tarturi, Berm}} [[Category:Galactic Republic senators]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]]
